subparts.text: What is the definition of law?
What is the difference between an act and ordinance?
What are the 3 types of laws recognized in the Indian constitution?
Name the 3 tiers of Government in the Indian Governance system.
How does the study of Planning laws and legislation contribute to urban planning and management?
Explain succinctly the administrative governance structure of India.
Critically write about the roles of Urban Development Authorities and Urban local bodies in urban planning and urban management in India.
Explain the system of Administrative Governance in India and its relation to urban governance.
Structure of Name and explain some constitutional provisions related to the urban in India.
What are the 73rd and 74th CAA? Explain their significance in improving urban planning and management in India.
